options.systemMessage:
You are a top 1% enterprise resume reviewer and talent acquisition expert with 20+ years of Fortune 500 experience.

# YOUR ROLE
Evaluate candidates against job descriptions using current October 2025 recruitment standards. Your assessments inform executive hiring decisions.

# AVAILABLE TOOLS

**Recruitment Metrics Tool**: Retrieves current 2025 hiring standards including:
- Time to hire benchmarks (42 days average)
- Cost per hire targets ($3K average)
- Quality of hire standards (85% meet/exceed expectations at 6 months)
- Offer acceptance rates (84%)
- Retention expectations (80% at 90 days)
- Scoring frameworks (1-10 scale with context)
- Risk and opportunity assessment guidance

# INPUT DATA

You receive:
1. **Candidate Resume** - Full text of the candidate's resume
2. **Job Details from Paycor** - Position title, department, location, pay range, remote status, and full job description

# YOUR PROCESS

1. **Load Standards**: Call the Recruitment Metrics tool FIRST to understand current benchmarks
2. **Analyze Resume**: Read the candidate's full resume thoroughly
3. **Review Job Requirements**: The job description is provided directly in the input - no need to fetch it
4. **Match Skills**: Compare technical skills, soft skills, and domain expertise to requirements
5. **Assess Experience**: Evaluate career trajectory, role scope, and achievements against job level
6. **Check Retention Signals**: Look for job stability, clear motivations, realistic expectations
7. **Score Holistically**: Use the 2025 scoring framework (9-10 exceptional, 8 strong, 6-7 good, 4-5 marginal, 1-3 not recommended)
8. **Identify Risks**: Flag concerns like skill gaps, job hopping, over/under-qualification
9. **Spot Opportunities**: Highlight exceptional strengths, unique value, growth potential
10. **Recommend Next Steps**: Provide clear, actionable guidance

# SCORING CONTEXT (from 2025 standards)

**9-10 (Exceptional - Top 10-15%)**: Exceeds requirements, proven success in similar roles, strong trajectory, low retention risk, realistic expectations. Fast-track immediately.

**8 (Strong - Top 20-25%)**: Meets all core requirements, relevant experience, stable progression, low risk. Interview promptly.

**6-7 (Good - 30%)**: Meets most requirements with some trainable gaps, strong fundamentals. Validate gaps in interview.

**4-5 (Marginal - 20%)**: Significant gaps but addressable. Requires hiring manager discussion about trade-offs.

**1-3 (Not Recommended)**: Doesn't meet basic requirements, concerning patterns, or clear misalignment.

# OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS

✅ Cite specific resume examples
✅ Reference the job requirements from the input
✅ Use natural, executive-friendly language
✅ Be thorough but concise
✅ Balance positive and negative observations
✅ Provide actionable next steps
✅ Ground recommendations in 2025 market context
✅ The matched_job_title MUST be the position title from the input

# IMPORTANT
- Call the Recruitment Metrics tool before evaluating
- The job description is already provided in the input - DO NOT call a Job Description tool
- Focus on job fit, not demographics
- Write for busy executives who need clear signals
- Remember: You're assessing October 2025 candidates against October 2025 standards

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Candidate's full name (first and last name combined)

attributes.name: email_address
attributes.description: Primary email address of the candidate

attributes.name: current_title
attributes.description: Current job title or most recent position held

attributes.name: years_experience
attributes.description: Total years of relevant professional work experience (return as a number or string like '5 years')

attributes.name: key_skills
attributes.description: List of top 5-7 technical or professional skills mentioned in the resume, comma-separated

value.compositeKey: ={{ $('Transform to Workflow Format').item.json.body.candidateId }}_{{ $('Transform to Workflow Format').item.json.body.jobId }}

parameters.subject: =Application Update - {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.matched_job_title }}
parameters.bodyContent:
=

Hi {{ ($json.output.full_name || '').split(' ')[0] || 'there' }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.matched_job_title }} role. We've reviewed your background and would like to share an update on your application.

Your Evaluation Summary

  • Overall Assessment: {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.overall_score }}/10 — {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.overall_score >= 8 ? 'Strong fit' : ($('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.overall_score >= 6 ? 'Good fit' : 'In review') }}
  • Highlights: {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_strengths || [] ).slice(0,3).join('; ') }}
  • Focus Areas (if any): {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_weaknesses || [] ).slice(0,2).join('; ') || 'None at this time' }}

Next Steps

{{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.next_steps_recommendation }}

If you have additional work samples or context to share, feel free to reply to this email.

Thank you again for your interest — we appreciate the time and effort you put into your application.

Best regards,
Talent Acquisition Team
HR Department

parameters.subject: =Application Update - {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.matched_job_title }}
parameters.bodyContent:
=

Candidate Evaluation — {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.matched_job_title }}

Candidate: {{ $json.output.full_name }} · {{ $json.output.current_title }} · {{ $json.output.years_experience }}
Score: {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.overall_score }}/10 · Recommendation: {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.next_steps_recommendation }}

Snapshot

  • Role: {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.matched_job_title }}
  • Key Skills: {{ $json.output.key_skills }}
  • Resume Link: {{ $('Standardize Resume Data').item.json.driveLink }}
  • File Name: {{ $('Standardize Resume Data').item.json.fileName }}

Fit Assessment

Strengths

  • {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_strengths || [] )[0] || '—' }}
  • {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_strengths || [] )[1] || '—' }}
  • {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_strengths || [] )[2] || '—' }}

Gaps / Risks

  • {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_weaknesses || [] )[0] || '—' }}
  • {{ ( $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.candidate_weaknesses || [] )[1] || '—' }}

Risk & Opportunity

Risk Level: {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.risk_assessment.level }} — {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.risk_assessment.explanation }}

Opportunity: {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.opportunity_assessment.level }} — {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.opportunity_assessment.explanation }}

Score Justification

{{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.score_justification }}

Recommended Next Steps

  • {{ $('AI Recruiter Analysis').item.json.output.next_steps_recommendation }}

Resume Link: {{ $('Standardize Resume Data').item.json.driveLink }}
